# Coordination Bottlenecks

## Handoffs between teams

Work stalls when ownership changes without a shared receipt of what changed,
why it changed, and who is accountable for the next step.

## Unclear priorities

Queues drift when urgent work and important work are not ranked against the
same operating goal.

## Tool fragmentation

State scatters across disconnected tools, which makes replay, audit, and
follow-through harder than the actual work.

## Meeting load

Recurring meetings can hide unresolved decisions when they do not produce
clear commitments.
